steps_en: Combine the listed ethers and essences according to one of the five proportion columns to obtain the desired rhum aroma.
This aroma is later blended into rhum ether/spirit mixtures to produce the so-called rhum extracts or essences.
Extended aging improves the fragrance and quality of the resulting rhum extract; a trace of glossy soot may be added to impart a smoky note if desired.
notes_en: This table lists five alternative formulas (I-V) for an aroma used in flavoring rhum extracts, distinct from the rhum ether distillation process described earlier on the page.
